summary: Remove unused `stages` and `sectors` map allocations in analytics_funding_by_sector.go.
reason: Greptile P2 finding on PR #694: the maps were populated inside the aggregation loop but never read; the final output is built entirely from the `cells` map and splitOnce, so the two maps only burned allocations and added reader noise.
validated_outcome: go build ./... still passes; analytics funding-by-sector output is unchanged.
